company: PT Nusantara Regas — Pertamina Subsidiary / SOE Energy Company
description: Designed backend architecture for mission-critical platforms across LNG operations, procurement, risk, reporting, and executive decision support. Architected an on-premise LLM knowledge assistant and redesigned it into a RAG pipeline with document chunking, embeddings, vector retrieval, contextual prompt orchestration, and controlled output handling. Built Airflow pipelines and a centralized SQL Server reporting store consolidating data from 30+ internal application databases for Power BI/Fabric dashboards. Integrated SCADA and FSRU operational systems, eliminating manual Excel workflows and saving about 80 staff-hours per month. Led 7 cross-functional Agile squads across architecture, code review, mentoring, vendor coordination, deployment, and operational governance.

Built an automated backend reporting engine for MyOrbit modem status reporting to Telkom, cutting report runtime by about 70% and improving scheduled data reliability. Managed and processed 5TB+ national-scale modem data, designing synchronization workflows into Google BigQuery for centralized analytics and near real-time operational insight. Led a 3-person squad to deliver Danone's doctor-facing LMS on schedule and scale it to thousands of users. Optimized AWS EC2 pricing-report services, improving system performance by about 50% while reducing infrastructure overhead.

Automated HCI claims and payment reporting with a Laravel CSV engine scheduled via SFTP, moving KPI turnaround from three-day follow-ups to same-day delivery and cutting runtime by about 70%. Rolled out a Laravel + React compensation and marketing program platform, replacing Excel macros for fee, contest, and referral tracking and reducing month-end processing effort by about 50%. Delivered the E-PDD policy-printing service, reducing issue-to-print time from 24 hours to under 1 hour.

Launched and ran HealingSolutions.id e-commerce stack (WordPress, WooCommerce) and social channels, driving the brand’s initial online revenue. Produced daily creative assets (Photoshop) and executed FB Ads/SEO campaigns, translating management strategy into measurable digital growth.
Built the company-profile site from scratch (HTML/CSS/JS, PHP) and created a lightweight CMS for content updates—giving the firm its first searchable web presence.
